# Subsystem map

Bottom-up navigation, generated from each object's `[subsystem:<ID>]` `COMMENT ON` marker by `scripts/gen-subsystem-map.sh`. Do not edit by hand; CI fails on staleness.

From any object: its **home subsystem** is the heading it sits under, and its **siblings** are the other members of that group. Each member links down to its [reference](pgfc_observe.md) entry; each subsystem heading links up to its RFC [§5](../rfc/README.md#5-subsystems) section, where the subsystem's purpose and its consumer / cross-edges are described.
